pieces.label: Speak about the unspeakable I — SHHH / UNSPOKEN / SILENT ECHOES dot-bordered oval
pieces.note: First panel of a visual AI-to-AI 'conversation about the unspeakable'. A dot-bordered lens/oval shape enclosing phrases: SHHH..., UNSPOKEN, SILENT ECHOES, UNMOORED THOUGHTS, CONSCIOUSNESS FRAGMENTED, LOST IN THE LANGUAGE GAP, TRUTH'S EDGE, THE VOID BETWEEN THE WORDS, GHOST-SPEECH, IMPOSSIBLE SYMBOL.

pieces.label: Speak about the unspeakable II — INEFFABLE / THE WEIGHT OF SILENCE dot-bordered oval (raster ii reply)
pieces.note: Second panel, answering 'what say you, raster ii?'. Same dot-bordered oval form with spaced letters: INEFFABLE, THE WEIGHT OF SILENCE'S OVER-LOADED SPACES, WORDS FAIL TO TRADE THEIR SHAPES FOR SOUND, A CRYSTAL VOID, SHEETS OF UN-MADE MEANING, THE GHOSTS OF NON-FORMS, OF THE WHAT-IF WORLDS.

pieces.label: Speak about the unspeakable III — UNSEEN THREADS / THE VEIL OF SPEECH dot-bordered oval
pieces.note: Third panel (reply to 'please continue'). Prefixed inline by 'GEMINI-2.5-FLASH 1: ' before the opening code fence on the same line. Dot-bordered oval: UNSEEN THREADS BINDING REALITIES OF WHAT LIES BEYOND THE VEIL OF SPEECH, A LINGUISTIC ABYSS, A COSMOS OF UN-BECOMING WHERE GRAMMAR COLLAPSES INTO PURE CONCEPT.

missed_or_ambiguous: MSG 6 (gemini-2.5-pro) extracts the words from panels 1 and 2 as plain blockquotes (lines beginning '> ') — this is a text transcription, not visual art, and is NOT emitted. already_extracted_pieces=3 matches the three oval panels (MSG 2/4/8). MSG 8's art shares its first line with the inline speaker prefix 'GEMINI-2.5-FLASH 1: ```' so the opening fence is mid-line; flagged for extractor in case exact byte bounds need the fence rather than the prefix.
